meta.name: Hallmark Inspection Report Review – Rules Reference v2

checkpoints.requirement: Produced quantity / Packed quantity (PO & Product details section) — The quantity recorded must match the Order PO QTY from the "Purchase Order Change" document, not the total order QTY. The IRF filled by the supplier is not a valid source.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check against the PO document and the IRF
fail_if: PO states 15,000 EA; IRF states 15,200 EA; report records 15,200 EA → wrong, must use PO qty
Report does not satisfy: The quantity recorded must match the Order PO QTY from the "Purchase Order Change" document, not the total order QTY. The IRF filled by the supplier is not a valid source.
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check against the PO document and the IRF

pass: PO states 15,000 EA; report records 15,000 EA
fail: PO states 15,000 EA; IRF states 15,200 EA; report records 15,200 EA → wrong, must use PO qty

checkpoints.requirement: Produced quantity / Packed quantity unit (PO & Product details section) — The unit (CTN or PCS) must match the unit stated in the IRF. Produced quantity and packed quantity must use the same unit consistently.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check produced qty unit, packed qty unit, and IRF unit
focus_terms: Packed quantity unit (PO & Product details section)
md_sections: Packed quantity unit (PO & Product details section)
fail_if: IRF states unit = CTN; report records produced quantity in PCS
Report does not satisfy: The unit (CTN or PCS) must match the unit stated in the IRF. Produced quantity and packed quantity must use the same unit consistently.
checkpoints.context: SECTION — cross-check produced qty unit, packed qty unit, and IRF unit

pass: IRF states unit = CTN; report records produced quantity and packed quantity both in CTN
fail: IRF states unit = CTN; report records produced quantity in PCS

checkpoints.requirement: Lot size used for sampling (Workmanship section) — For PDQ products, the lot size entered for sampling must be the retail unit quantity (PDQ count × units per PDQ), not the PDQ count itself.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check lot size against PDQ count and units per PDQ stated in spec
focus_terms: Lot size used for sampling (Workmanship section)
md_sections: Lot size used for sampling (Workmanship section)
fail_if: 500 PDQs × 12 units each; report uses lot size = 500
Report does not satisfy: For PDQ products, the lot size entered for sampling must be the retail unit quantity (PDQ count × units per PDQ), not the PDQ count itself.
checkpoints.context: SECTION — cross-check lot size against PDQ count and units per PDQ stated in spec

pass: 500 PDQs × 12 units each; report uses lot size = 6,000
fail: 500 PDQs × 12 units each; report uses lot size = 500

checkpoints.requirement: SAP Group Number field (Document Availability checklist) — The SAP Group # in the report must match the SAP Group # on the purchase order.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check report SAP Group # against PO document
focus_terms: SAP Group Number field (Document Availability checklist)
fail_if: PO shows HMK9700; report records HMK9725
Report does not satisfy: The SAP Group # in the report must match the SAP Group # on the purchase order.
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check report SAP Group # against PO document

pass: PO shows HMK9725; report records HMK9725
fail: PO shows HMK9700; report records HMK9725

checkpoints.requirement: Inspection type / AOQL (report header) — When multiple specifications appear in one report, the inspection type and AOQL must be derived from the spec whose SAP Group # matches the order, not from any other spec present.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check inspection type against the correct SAP Group # spec
fail_if: Report contains spec HMK9700 (AOQL 1.5%) and spec HMK9725 (AOQL 3.0%); PO references HMK9725 but report uses AOQL 1.5%

Report does not satisfy: When multiple specifications appear in one report, the inspection type and AOQL must be derived from the spec whose SAP Group # matches the order, not from any other spec present.
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check inspection type against the correct SAP Group # spec

pass: PO references HMK9725; report correctly uses AOQL 3.0%
fail: Report contains spec HMK9700 (AOQL 1.5%) and spec HMK9725 (AOQL 3.0%); PO references HMK9725 but report uses AOQL 1.5%

checkpoints.requirement: HMK Inspection Reason field (Document Availability checklist) — The value selected must match the reason stated in the supplier's IRF. See valid values below.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check against the IRF document
focus_terms: HMK Inspection Reason field (Document Availability checklist)
fail_if: IRF reason field is blank; report selects "CQS – Inspection audit selected lot"
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check against the IRF document
checkpoints.lookup_table:
| IRF reason field | Expected report value |
|---|---|
| Blank | Non-CQS or Non-SEP supplier |
| CQS audit | CQS – Inspection audit selected lot |
| High attention | CQS/SEP – High attention item |
| New format | CQS/SEP – New format |
| Engineer request | CQS/SEP – Hallmark engineer request (email/specs) |
| Retailer request | CQS/SEP – Retailer/licensor request – Walmart / M&S / Costco / Australia / Walgreens |

pass: IRF reason field is blank; report selects "Non-CQS or Non-SEP supplier"
fail: IRF reason field is blank; report selects "CQS – Inspection audit selected lot"

checkpoints.requirement: High Attention Product (HA) field / HCLP field (Document Availability checklist) — If the order ships to USA Kansas City (KC), both HA and HCLP fields must be answered Yes or No per the product specification. If the order does NOT ship to KC, both fields must be N/A.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check destination (PO & Product details) against HA/HCLP field values
fail_if: Destination = KC HKBO; HA field = N/A

Report does not satisfy: If the order ships to USA Kansas City (KC), both HA and HCLP fields must be answered Yes or No per the product specification. If the order does NOT ship to KC, both fields must be N/A.
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check destination (PO & Product details) against HA/HCLP field values
never_flag_if: the order ships to USA Kansas City (KC) is not identified or mentioned in the report

pass: Destination = KC HKBO; HA field = No (per spec); HCLP field = No (per spec)
fail: Destination = KC HKBO; HA field = N/A

checkpoints.requirement: All photo fields throughout the report — For HCLP products, the report must contain no product photos. Every image field must show a blank image with the remark "HCLP, no photo". This applies to all sections including defect photos.

Report does not satisfy: For HCLP products, the report must contain no product photos. Every image field must show a blank image with the remark "HCLP, no photo". This applies to all sections including defect photos.

pass: HCLP = Yes; all image fields show blank image captioned "HCLP, no photo"
fail: HCLP = Yes; report contains a photo of the retail product in the DAS check section

checkpoints.requirement: Report header / Inspector's remark — For re-inspection reports, the reason for re-inspection must appear at the head of the report.

fail: Report is a re-inspection after a previous FAIL; no re-inspection reason stated at the top

checkpoints.requirement: SR Test Report Check (Document Availability checklist) — SR checkpoint result must be "Passed". If not passed, the overall report result must be FAIL.

checkpoints.requirement: SR Test Report Check — report date / validity (Document Availability checklist) — SR report validity: standard products = 1 year; Toys & Children products = 4 weeks; Food-contact products (group HMK9700) = per PO. Check the SR report issue date against the inspection date.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check SR issue date, product category, and SAP group

fail: Product = toy; SR report dated 6 months ago → expired (must be ≤4 weeks)

checkpoints.requirement: SR Test Report Check (Document Availability checklist) — If the SR report covers product format level (not SKU level), verify the format matches the inspected product and the report is within validity. This must be noted in the report remarks.
focus_terms: SR Test Report Check (Document Availability checklist)
fail_if: SR report is format-level; no remark confirming format match in the report

From 2024 onwards it is included as an appendix in the FR report. If missing, the Documents checkpoint must be failed.

checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check product category (name/description), destination (PO), and inspection type in header
checkpoints.lookup_table:
| Product category | Destination | Expected inspection type |

| 3D – HMK Ornaments, Gifts (excl. Plush) | Dayspring, Mary & Martha | AOQL 3.0% Single Sampling (min. sample 85) |
| 3D – HMK Ornaments, Gifts (excl. Plush) | Walmart FOB | AQL 1.5 / 4.0 Level I |
| 3D – Gifts Plush | KC, UK, HCA, AU, NL, Dayspring, M&M | AOQL 1.5% & 4.0% Single Sampling |
| 3D – Keepsake (KPS) | KC, UK, HCA, AU, NL, Nihon | AOQL 1.5% Single Sampling |
| 3D – Keepsake (KPS) | Walmart FOB | AQL 1.5 / 4.0 Level I |
| 3D – Hengfeng Ceramic | All | AOQL Single Sampling +2 levels vs. standard table |
| 3D – Crayola | KC, UK, NL, AU, Nihon, Mexico, France | AQL 1.5 / 4.0 Level II |
| 3D – Fixtures & Dealer Service | KC, UK, HCA, AU, NL, Nihon | AOQL 2.5% Single Sampling; fixed sample = 15 |
| 2D – HA items | All | Single Sampling Plan |
| 2D – Non-HA, individually packed | Standard HMK | Double Sampling Plan |
| 2D – Non-HA, mixed-packed | Standard HMK | Single Sampling Plan |
| 2D – Dayspring | All | QIMA/HMK: Double Sampling; other: Single Sampling |

checkpoints.requirement: Sharp point / sharp edge checkpoint (Workmanship or checklist section) — Sharp point/edge check must be recorded for ALL Hallmark products. All products are considered free of shape hazard by default. If a sharp point or edge is found, it must be reported and escalated to PE — it is not automatically classified as Critical, but PE must evaluate.
